testcase.name: my account page renders login/register area
checkout requires cart (should show checkout form or cart-empty notice)
header quicklinks work
testcase.failure: [chromium] › navigation-and-search.spec.ts:13:5 › header quicklinks work ───────────────────────── Test timeout of 60000ms exceeded. Error: locator.click: Test timeout of 60000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('.norelle-header-quicklinks a').filter({ hasText: /^cart/i }).first() - locator resolved to … - attempting click action 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 20ms 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 100ms 111 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 500ms 4 | const quick = page.locator('.norelle-header-quicklinks a', { hasText: name }); 5 | if (await quick.count()) { > 6 | await quick.first().click(); | ^ 7 | return; 8 | } 9 | at clickNavLink (C:\Users\prova\Documents\Projects\Norelle\tests\e2e\navigation-and-search.spec.ts:6:25) at C:\Users\prova\Documents\Projects\Norelle\tests\e2e\navigation-and-search.spec.ts:19:3 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\playwright\navigation-and-search-header-quicklinks-work-chromium\test-failed-1.webp ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\playwright\navigation-and-search-header-quicklinks-work-chromium\video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\..\test-results\playwright\navigation-and-search-header-quicklinks-work-chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: shop search form exists (if theme provides it)

failure.message: navigation-and-search.spec.ts:26:5 shop search form exists (if theme provides it)

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › navigation-and-search.spec.ts:26:5 › shop search form exists (if theme provides it) ─
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('form.search-form input[type="search"], form.woocommerce-product-search input[type="search"], input[type="search"]').first() Expected: visible Received: hidden Timeout: 10000ms
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 10000ms - waiting for locator('form.search-form input[type="search"], form.woocommerce-product-search input[type="search"], input[type="search"]').first() 13 × locator resolved to <input value="" name="s" type="search" class="search-field" placeholder="Search products…" id="woocommerce-product-search-field-0"/> - unexpected value "hidden"

testcase.name: can add first product to cart

failure.message: webshop-smoke.spec.ts:22:5 can add first product to cart

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › webshop-smoke.spec.ts:22:5 › can add first product to cart ──────────────────────────

Expected: > 0 Received: 0
